title: Publish v0.5.31 finalization metadata
outOfScope: Changing release workflow semantics beyond pending-publication evidence handling.

sources.reason: Release metadata is finalized by the parent publication change.
Candidate metadata is synchronized with the pending publication.

riskAssessment.reason: Metadata-only finalization; immutable publication remains gated by the release workflow.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized the release finalization and continuous execution through Work Item 18.

preReviewWarnings: Confirm release metadata, candidate evidence, and pending-publication checks remain internally consistent.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Release and candidate metadata identify v0.5.31 consistently.
Supply-chain evidence and derived digests match the metadata.
The release-preparation distribution check passes before publication.
guidelines: Preserve immutable release evidence and fail-closed publication gates.
Keep Work Item evidence complete and reviewable.

intent.problem: The final v0.5.31 metadata publication requires a governed Work Item record so CI can verify the release change.
constraints: Do not publish an immutable tag until PR checks pass.
Keep the user-authorized continuous execution in scope.
intent.rationale: A dedicated archived record satisfies the repository's one Work Item per PR governance rule.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: The user explicitly authorized execution through release and Work Item 18 cleanup.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
